title: Settings
subtitle: Account, loan data, backup and personalisation.

theme.intro: Choose how the app looks. "System" follows your device settings.
theme.label: Theme

security.pinOn: PIN on — the app asks for it on launch.
security.pinOff: Protect the app with a 6-digit PIN, asked on launch.
security.errPinDigits: The PIN must be exactly 6 digits.
security.bioDesc: Use this device's fingerprint / face unlock to unlock, with the PIN as a fallback.
security.bioNeedsPin: 👤 Biometric unlock: set up a PIN first (it's the fallback), then you can enable fingerprint / face unlock here.
security.bioFailed: Couldn't enable biometrics. Please try again.

account.emailHint: To change your email, contact us.
account.signOutDesc: You'll need to sign in again to get back in.

language.label: Application language
language.intro: Choose the interface language. Your preference is saved on this device and to your account.

export.intro: Export everything stored to a JSON file: loan data, payments, overpayments, portfolio, contributions and settings. Useful as a backup or to inspect your data.
export.footer: The file does <1>not</1> contain your password. Keep it safe — it includes personal financial details.

import.intro: Restore a previous JSON backup. Everything currently stored (loan, portfolio, settings) <1>will be replaced</1> by the file's data. Your account (email, password) is left untouched. Accepts both WALLET v1 exports and the Claude Design prototype JSON.
import.success: ✓ Imported successfully ({{source}}): loan {{loan}}, {{assets}} asset(s), {{incomes}} income(s), {{expenses}} expense(s), settings {{settings}}.
import.invalidFile: Invalid file — it doesn't look like a WALLET backup or a prototype export.
import.confirmReplace: I confirm I want to replace all my current data.

euribor.noLoan: Set up a loan first (the <1>Credit</1> tab) before you can edit the Euribor history.
euribor.intro: The current Euribor for <1>{{name}}</1> is <2>{{value}}</2>. Adding a new entry also updates this value.

watchlist.intro: Customise the tickers shown in <1>Investments → Trending · Nasdaq</1>. Maximum 16. Accepts Nasdaq/NYSE tickers (only A-Z, 0-9, dot, hyphen). Empty list = use the default ({{count}} tickers).

danger.head: ⚠️ Danger zone
danger.intro: These actions are irreversible. To avoid accidental loss, we recommend downloading a backup first in <1>Settings → Data</1>.
danger.resetDesc: Deletes loan, payments, overpayments, portfolio and settings. Your account (email, password) is kept.
danger.deleteDesc: Permanently deletes your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.resetModalIntro: This will delete loan + portfolio + settings. Your account is kept. Enter your current password to confirm.
danger.deleteModalIntro: This action is <1>irreversible</1>. Your account, loan, portfolio and all associated data will be deleted.

demo.head: Demo mode
demo.openDesc: Open a demo account with sample data to explore the app. Your account isn't affected.
demo.openConfirm: This signs you out and opens a temporary demo account. Your data is not affected. Continue?
demo.activeDesc: You're in a demo account. The data is temporary and may be wiped.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.intro: Get alerts on this device: payments coming due, Euribor revisions and statement-import reminders. The monthly email digest is controlled here too.
notifications.denied: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Enable them in the site settings.
notifications.error: Could not update notifications. Try again.
notifications.iosHint: On iPhone/iPad, notifications only work when the app is installed on the home screen (Share → Add to Home Screen).
